Maze Runner: The Death Cure (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $58,032,443Details
International Box Office $207,846,093
Worldwide Box Office $265,878,536
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,014,129
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $7,244,426
Total $12,258,555
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Thomas leads his group of escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Anyone who makes it out alive will get answers to the questions the Gladers have been asking since they first arrived in the maze.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,167,011 (41.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.40 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:21.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$61,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,787 opening theaters/3,793 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $76,187,484

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 26th, 2018 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: January 17th, 2018 (Wide) (South Korea)
January 19th, 2018 (Wide) (New Zealand)
January 19th, 2018 (Wide) (Taiwan)
January 19th, 2018 (Wide) (Australia)
January 25th, 2018 (Wide) (China)
Video Release: April 10th, 2018 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of sci-fi violence and action, language, and some thematic elements.
Running Time: 114 minutes
Franchise: The Maze Runner
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Zombies
Social setting: Dystopia, Post Apocalypse
Source material: Young Adult Book Adaptation
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Gotham Group, Temple Hill Entertainment, TSG Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Thomas leads his group of escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet.
